parsed_output.justification: Justin's claims were highly inconsistent throughout the discussion, shifting from the Robber to the Drunk/Tanner and finally to the Tanner. He initially attempted to frame Mitchell by claiming the Robber role, but quickly retracted this when Mitchell also claimed to be the Robber. This pattern of erratic role-claiming and shifting narratives is characteristic of a Werewolf attempting to deceive the group or a Tanner attempting to be voted out, but given the options, he is the most suspicious candidate for a Werewolf.
